description: Creates a Person for a given company ID

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Response schema containing a unique identifier.
Request body schema for creating a new Person.

is_user.description: Determines if the Person can log into the app.

is_assignable.description: Determines if the Person can be assigned to tasks.

status.description: The status of the Person. `active` means the person is visible in all pages, while `inactive` hides the person unless filtered. Inactive People do not count against billing plans.

group_ids.description: Array of UUIDs representing the Groups this Person belongs to. Can be empty if the Person is an Admin.

email.description: The email that the Person will log in with. Required if `is_user` is true.

permission_level_id.description: UUID of the Permission Level assigned to the Person.

no_invite.description: If `true`, the Person will be created with all user properties but will not receive an invite until triggered manually by an Admin.

password.description: Password for logging in. If not provided, an email will be sent to the user to set their password. Must be at least 8 characters with one uppercase, one lowercase, and one number.

notification_profile_id.description: UUID of the Notification Profile for the user.

phone.description: The Person's phone number, including country and area code. Must be unique among all registered People. **Note:** Pass `null` or exclude the field if the Person should not have a phone number.

can_receive_sms.description: Determines if the Person can receive SMS notifications.

can_receive_email.description: Determines if the Person can receive email notifications.

can_receive_mobile.description: Determines if the Person can receive mobile push notifications if they have the app installed.

address_1.description: First part of the Person's address.

address_2.description: Second part of the Person's address (e.g., Apartment, Suite, Unit).

city_town.description: The city or town where the Person is located.

state_province.description: The state or province where the Person is located.

zipcode.description: The postal/zip code of the Person.

country.description: The country where the Person is located.

job_title_id.description: UUID reference to a Job Title in the LaborChart System.

hourly_wage.description: Hourly wage rate for the Person. Used for automatic spend tracking.

emergency_contact_name.description: Name of the Person's emergency contact.

emergency_contact_number.description: Phone number of the emergency contact.

emergency_contact_email.description: Email address of the emergency contact.

emergency_contact_relation.description: The relationship between the Person and their emergency contact.

dob.description: Date of birth of the Person. Accepts ISO Date String, UTC Date String, or MS Numeric Epoch Time.

hired_date.description: Date the Person was hired. Accepts ISO Date String, UTC Date String, or MS Numeric Epoch Time.

is_male.description: Specifies if the Person identifies as male.

language.description: Language preference. Currently only `english` is supported.

tag_instances.description: List of tags applied to the Person. Tags can require expiration dates.

expr_date.description: Expiration date for the Tag, if applicable.
